name: Optimized V1 — proactive billing, staggered breaks, attended trial rooms
description: First optimized policy. Diffs ONLY baseline by tuning the three levers Parthiv's engine has wired today: L1 billing schedule, L2 floor-staff break pattern + one mid-shift reallocation, L3 trial-room attendant + item-cap enforcement. L4 (merchandising) and L5 (cross-merch / replenishment) are spec'd in manit-notes/08 but the engine doesn't yet read those knobs (see engine support matrix). Same agents, same seed, same arrivals — only the environment differs.

lever_1_billing.rationale: Counter 2 opens proactively at 17:00 (well before evening peak), Counter 3 at 18:00. Reactive rules are kept as a safety net but with much tighter staffing-delay (B03/B04 stationed at counter, not 'called from floor'). Closes the 8-minute abandonment window in the baseline.

reallocations.rationale: Infants zone gets ~4× fewer planned visits than women's ethnic. Evening peak demand is concentrated in W-ethnic. F09 reallocates at 17:00 and returns at close. Causal mechanism: more staff in the busy zone → more shoppers assisted → higher basket-build rate via _tickStaff.

lever_2_floor_staffing.rationale: Stagger the lunch and dinner break windows so no more than 2 staff are off at once (vs 5 baseline). Spreads the same total break hours across 12:30-15:00 and 18:30-21:00 windows. No new headcount.

lever_3_trial_rooms.rationale: T01 stations at the women's trial bank (was doing floor relief in baseline). Enforces the 4-items-per-cubicle limit. Per brief, this drops cubicle turnover ~25% (the engine applies trial_service_mul = 0.75). Causal mechanism: shorter trial-room queue → fewer abandonment-by-wait events → more memos.

lever_4_merchandising._wiring_status: NOT WIRED — engine support matrix in manit-notes/08 marks L4 as not-wired. Keys retained for schema completeness, engine ignores them.

lever_5_cross_merch_and_replenishment._wiring_status: NOT WIRED — engine support matrix in manit-notes/08 marks L5 as not-wired. Keys retained for schema completeness, engine ignores them.

do_not_touch.agent_data: data/agents.json — frozen across baseline & optimized runs
